title: thymus membranaceus subsp. murcicus
intro: Thymus membranaceus subsp. murcicus, also known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus membranaceus plant, a low-growing, shrubby perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spanish thyme include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and promote wound healing, among others. Spanish thyme can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
